title: UI Test Overuse Auditor
description: Scan Playwright, WebdriverIO, and Selenium/WebDriver suites in any language (TS/JS, Python, Java, C#, Ruby) to find where UI/E2E tests are overused. For each, decide keep-as-UI, demote-to-API, or demote-to-unit — collapsing data-driven repetition (validation matrices, role/permission loops, calculation checks) into parameterized API tests and keeping only genuine browser journeys at the top. Enforces guardrails: relocate coverage never delete it, name a specific target endpoint or unit for every demotion, keep exactly one UI happy-path per journey, classify on the test body not its title, and rank recommendations by payoff (slowest/flakiest/most-duplicated first). Ships ready-to-run ripgrep inventory commands and cross-language before/after conversions, and produces a per-test migration report rather than rewriting files.
